message:
refactor(context): adopt Canonical() for agent capabilities, compaction, rotation, and triggers

- compact.go: rewrite GetAgentCapabilities switch to use Canonical(),
  add Ollama to the no-compaction group, add Method field and
  compactionMethodForCommand helper to CompactionCommand
- rotation.go: use Canonical() in rotation strategy selection and
  agent-type-aware rotation intervals
- trigger.go: canonical agent types in trigger evaluation
- handoff_trigger.go: canonical types in handoff decision logic
- pack.go: normalize agent types in context packing
- All files: expanded test coverage for alias inputs (openai-codex,
  google-gemini, ws, etc.) and whitespace handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
